title: Multiple Return Values
description: Define a function that returns two integers: the sum and product of its inputs.
problemStatement:
Go functions can return any number of results! Create a function `calc(a, b int) (int, int)` that returns the sum and product. In `main`, call it with `3, 4` and print both results.

**Expected Output:** `7 12`.
hints: Syntax for return types: `func name() (type1, type2) { ... }`
